list-resource-groups.ps1.name: List-ResourceGroups
list-resource-groups.ps1.description: Lists all resource groups in the subscription

stop-idle-vms.ps1.name: Stop-IdleVMs
stop-idle-vms.ps1.description: Stops all running VMs in the subscription

cleanup-unused-disks.ps1.name: Cleanup-UnusedDisks
cleanup-unused-disks.ps1.description: Finds and removes unattached managed disks

check-tag-compliance.ps1.name: Check-TagCompliance
check-tag-compliance.ps1.description: Reports resources missing required tags (Environment, Owner, CostCenter)

export-cost-report.ps1.name: Export-CostReport
export-cost-report.ps1.description: Exports 30-day cost and usage summary grouped by Azure service
